data.title: Elite Robots Launches RoboBarista to Revolutionize Self-Service Coffee Experiences in Commercial and Public Spaces
data.description: Elite Robots, a top player in collaborative robotics, unveiled RoboBarista on April 30, 2026. The autonomous coffee station is tailor-made for busy commercial areas, offering a blend of precision cobot technology and top-tier brewing capabilities. This innovation marks a step forward in the realm of automated coffee services.

data.title: Viavi Stock Is Trending Overnight: Here's What You Should Know
data.description: Viavi Solutions Inc. (NASDAQ: VIAV) saw a significant increase in shares on Wednesday evening, with a 25.17% jump to $56.99 after reporting fiscal third quarter results that surpassed analyst predictions. The earnings beat estimates by 22.73% and revenue by 3.32% for the quarter ending Mar. 28. The net revenue for Q3 reached $406.8 million, marking a 42.8% rise from the previous year. Non-GAAP earnings per share were $0.27, an 80% increase YoY, while the non-GAAP operating margin grew by 430 basis points to 21.0%. The network and service enablement segment experienced the most growth, increasing by 54.4% YoY to $321.5 million. Viavi held $508 million in cash and short-term investments as of March 28. CEO Oleg Khaykin attributed the successful quarter to strong growth in the data center and aerospace and defense markets. The company provided optimistic guidance for Q4.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures: Google, Amazon, Meta, Microsoft Are Big Earnings Movers; Oil Prices Keep Rising
data.description: Stock futures experienced a decline due to a slump in earnings for tech giants Amazon, Microsoft, and Meta, while Google saw an increase. Oil prices are on the rise, and Federal Reserve Chair Powell has confirmed he will remain in his position. The Dow Jones Futures show significant movements from Google, Amazon, Meta, and Microsoft due to their earnings reports, while oil prices continue to surge.
